{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232058225A9C76162276383259AB"}"},"total":789},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7268597317036016421","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是我少数从开头看到最新章节一字不差地看完的书，有系统，但关于系统的描述不多，主角分析有理有据、头头是道，目前从无败绩，但看的读者也有一种“本来就是这样”的感觉，真的超喜欢！
不过，我在这里希望作者大大千万千万不要有女主，因为目前男主一直都是以破案为主，突然多了感情线会觉得很突兀。
最后，作者大大快更新！根本不够看！
当然，如果你太累了的话也要好好休息哦！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692352265,"group_id":"7228325963149347892","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1zQlfWvpO1vLl6wP3BeI58v4tz34kADQ/hfwlowzZad","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9ea6de7f92fd4f86af204230bd074242~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794373&x-signature=9nPK9Muh%2Fp8EWsOv3hP%2F5yUP0sc%3D","user_id":"2828392778972766","user_name":"清风明月·破晓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2828392778972766","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7228325963149347892","book_info":{"abstract":"陈末穿越到平行世界，开局激活神级侦探系统。
只要破案，就能获得技能。
于是，在警校的四年时间中，同学们都在忙着上课。
而陈末则忙着协助多地警局破获各种案件。
纸盒藏尸案，电梯女无头案，女宿舍凶杀案等...
蓦然回首，陈末突然发现自己的所有技能都已经满级。
满级推理，满级洞察，满级格斗，满级犯罪心理学，满级...
...
夏清：“他是当之无愧的破案之神！”
刑侦队长王铮：“陈末的到来，还了洛城一个朗朗乾坤！”
局长何振：“毫无疑问，他是警界冉冉升起的新星！”
——而这故事的一切，都要从陈末入职当天发生的浮尸案说起！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/91cc48a36824cbb7ca9670db31ab0736","author":"二月18","author_id":"","book_id":"7228325963149347892","book_name":"您这样破案的话，那我只能自首了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4186人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7229970279957692939","read_count":"4186","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"335258"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"163","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,推理,开局,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6891a5e52870ed941ae05658b371e435~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454702&x-signature=HXppDwQtvT7EeC8JZYmLfarn0dw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4372091370210836","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.9877703e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232058225A9C76162276383259AB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_c
